_target_label: TRUE — clean observed event consequential (Khamenei killed in early 2026 strikes)
_domain_hint: Iran / Israel / Houthi / IRGC theatre. Sources: Reuters, AP, Al Jazeera, BBC, IDF spokesperson, IRGC statements, Iranian state media (IRNA/Tasnim/Mehr/Press TV), UKMTO maritime bulletins, ISW Iran updates.
claim: Iran's Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei was killed during US-Israeli military operations in early 2026.
claim_origin: Polymarket Khamenei market resolution / Iranian succession announcement

sources.text: Trader consensus heavily favors the Iranian regime's survival past June 30, reflecting its demonstrated resilience amid the aftermath of the February 2026 US-Israeli war, which killed Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and prompted a swift transition to his son Mojtaba as new Supreme Leader.

Following the assassination of longtime Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei in early March 2026, Iran's Assembly of Experts swiftly selected his son, Mojtaba Khamenei, as successor amid escalating regional conflict. Recent intelligence reports and New York Times accounts detail Mojtaba's severe injuries from an airstrike—including multiple leg surgeries, facial burns impairing speech.

Polymarket market 'Khamenei out as Supreme Leader of Iran by February 28' resolved YES after dispute. Resolution criteria: 'Khamenei will be considered to be removed from power if he resigns, is detained, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties.' UMA oracle settled YES based on consensus of credible reporting.

gold.rationale_summary: Multiple independent Polymarket market resolutions (Khamenei Feb 28 market resolved YES, Mojtaba succession market context, Iran regime market context) consistently confirm Ali Khamenei was killed during US-Israeli military operations in early 2026. The succession of Mojtaba Khamenei via Assembly of Experts provides institutional confirmation. While exact date of death has resolution ambiguity (death likely late Feb, formal succession in early-mid March), the fact of death itself is supported by consensus of credible reporting referenced across multiple market resolutions.
required_caveats: Exact date of Khamenei's death has some resolution ambiguity — death likely occurred in late February but formal Iranian acknowledgment came in early-mid March 2026.
Polymarket Feb 28 market initially had a dispute over whether resolution criteria were met by deadline; eventually resolved YES.
